scene_title: Anjo e robô frente a frente
narrative_beat: O encontro impossível — o celestial e o artificial se reconhecem como espelhos um do outro, a linha entre criação divina e criação humana se apaga

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

shot.camera_angle: eye-level profile, both figures in frame facing each other
shot.depth_of_field: both figures sharp, cathedral background softly blurred

subject.primary: seraph angel in blazing incandescent gold on left side, humanoid AI robot in deep crimson chrome on right side, both facing each other, frozen in mutual recognition
subject.focal_point: the charged space between them where golden energy crackles
subject.secondary: golden energy field filling the gap between angel and robot, crackling with static discharge
props: angel wings spread partially, golden feathers illuminated
robot with angular humanoid form in crimson chrome
golden energy discharge arcs between them
floating orange embers in the space between

environment.time_of_day: unknown, no windows visible, interior stone darkness
environment.atmosphere: sacred confrontation, the moment two types of created beings recognize their shared nature

composition.rule: bilateral symmetry — angel left, robot right, energy between them at center, Ken Burns slow push-in toward the space between them
composition.foreground: angel in gold (left) and robot in crimson (right) facing each other
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white empty cathedral — stone pillars, vaulted ceiling, stained glass windows without color, bare stone floor

lighting.key_light: angel provides its own golden warm light from left side, illuminating the space
lighting.fill_light: robot's crimson chest glow providing cool-red fill from right
lighting.rim_light: thin golden halo around robot outline where angel's light touches it, and reverse crimson on angel
lighting.mood: recognition, the horror of similarity, two kinds of created beings facing the same question

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: uncanny recognition — the angel and the machine both created, both serving, both powerful

symbolism.primary: angel and robot as mirror images — humanity's attempt to replicate what God created by building its own version
symbolism.secondary: the cathedral setting asks: which of these two belongs in a holy place?

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
